![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mprimer-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

PRIMER

## Exterior / Preparation

### Primer polish for coating application.

Q² Primer is a finishing polish that prepares paintwork for ceramic coating application. It removes light defects while leaving a clean, smooth surface that enhances coating adhesion.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2mprimer_120_1000_2024-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Polish and prepare in one step

Q² Primer simplifies the coating preparation process by combining light correction and surface preparation in one step. It refines the paint, improves clarity and creates ideal conditions for long lasting coating performance.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons37.svg)

LOW DUST 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons46.svg)

NO SILICONES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons42.svg)

NO FILLERS 

what makes

Q2 PRIMER so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2016/10/32331908_2135751603321633_5678704109780205568_o.jpeg)

Removes light defects while refining the surface for coating application

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2primer.webp)

CAPACITIES 

120 ML / 1000 ML

Cut 

Finish 

Consumption

40ML/CAR

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

PRIMER

01
Wash and decontaminate the paint before polishing. 

02
Apply a generous amount of product to a polish or finish polishing pad. 

03
Work the product at low to medium speed until fully broken down. 

04
Wipe off residue with a clean microfibre towel. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Can Q² Primer be used before any ceramic coating? 

Yes. It is designed to work with all GYEON coatings.

02
Does it contain fillers or protection? 

No. It leaves the surface clean and ready for coating.

03
Is degreasing still required after using Q² Primer? 

We would recommend degreasing the surface with Q2M Prep if you wish to coat right away.

04
Is it suitable for soft paint? 

Yes. It is safe and effective on all modern paint types.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000252018-Q-Primer)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
